name: Backyard Market in Black Forest - Winter

Address.value: 13710 Black Forest Road, Colorado Springs, CO 80908 (Edith Wolford Elementary School)

Products.value: 50+ local food and artisan vendors, food trucks, holiday gifts

notes: On-file website (thebackyardmarkets.com) and Facebook (BackyardMarketinBF) confirmed official/correct for operator Backyard Market Inc., which also runs the year-round Farm Shop at 6845 Shoup Rd and the weekly summer Black Forest Farmers Market (May-Oct, Sat 9am-1pm) at 6845 Shoup Rd. This specific record ('Winter') corresponds to the operator's seasonal Holiday Markets (branded 'Fall Into Winter Holiday Market' and 'Holiday Market in Black Forest'), which are held indoors/outdoors at Edith Wolford Elementary School, 13710 Black Forest Road — a different, more accurate address than the on-file 6845 Shoup Rd (that address is for the summer market/Farm Shop, not the winter event). Confirmed 2025 winter event dates were Nov 15 and Dec 13 (both Sat 10am-3pm); exact 2026 calendar dates were not published on the site (applications listed as 'closed'), so 'Months Open' is given as November/December rather than specific dates. SNAP/EBT acceptance is explicitly stated on the operator's main/summer market page ('SNAP and Colorado Produce Bonus are welcomed') but is not separately confirmed for the Holiday/Winter events specifically, so it was omitted rather than assumed. ADA accessibility and certified-organic status are not stated for this market; no market-specific email was found.
